name: What do I do first if I think my cancer is from asbestos at my job in Boise?
description: Report to employer now, see doctor for work-related diagnosis, file claim.[3]

mainEntity.name: What do I do first if I think my cancer is from asbestos at my job in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report to employer now, see doctor for work-related diagnosis, file claim.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Report immediately to your employer in writing and seek medical care explaining work connection.[2][3] Idaho requires notice within 60 days, but exceptions exist if no prejudice.[3] Key factors: Get doctor's report tying illness to work, file claim form promptly, notify insurer. Document everything and avoid signing denials; contact an Idaho workers comp attorney for guidance on next steps.
